assertions.agent_reload: run-scoped runtime log contains loaded=true codex/gpt-5.4
assertions.request_provider: run-scoped runtime log contains [E2E-DEBUG] chat_request provider=codex
assertions.settings_restore: file and isolated localStorage equal their exact snapshots; runtime reload is loaded=true gemini/gemini-2.5-flash
assertions.webview_isolation: XDG config/data/cache confined to ~/.naia/run/codex-live-e2e-xdg and removed on completion
assertions.crash_recovery: simulated worker exit 86 after Codex mutation; launcher restored the durable config backup and removed it

regression.shell_ui: 121 files passed, 2 skipped; 1332 tests passed, 13 skipped

diagnostic_note: Early diagnostic runs exposed three harness defects rather than product failures: an unsupported two-argument expect call, provider/usage assertions that were not causally scoped to the new request, and an undisposed permission poller that hot-looped after WebKit session teardown and exhausted the worker heap. The final committed source fixes all three, adds durable crash recovery and isolated WebView state, and exits 0. The operational Codex request itself rendered the marker and usage in every run that reached chat.
